implementation.raw_test_report_hash_input: UTF-8 bytes after the WHISPER_NGRAM_ACCEPTANCE_SCREEN_JSON= marker through the end of that output line, excluding the marker and line ending

baseline_correction.problem: The multilingual model prompt previously omitted <|en|>; clear English TTS produced blank or pathological repeated non-English output.
baseline_correction.change: Insert the tokenizer-resolved <|en|> token and reject unsupported language/timestamp options instead of ignoring them.
baseline_correction.post_change_result: All eight fixtures terminated at EOT with intelligible English transcripts; this corpus is not a WER benchmark.

fixtures.name: cal-01-natural.wav
fixtures.source_text: The morning train leaves the station at seven thirty, carrying students and commuters toward the city center.
fixtures.target_transcript: The Morning Train leaves the station at 7.30, carrying students and commuters toward the city center.

fixtures.name: cal-02-repeated.wav
fixtures.source_text: Please confirm the order number. The order number is forty two seven. I repeat, the order number is forty two seven.
fixtures.target_transcript: Please confirm the order number. The order number is 42/7. I repeat. The order number is 42/7.

fixtures.name: cal-03-natural.wav
fixtures.source_text: A careful renderer checks every region of the image before accepting a faster draft as the final frame.
fixtures.target_transcript: a careful renderer checks every region of the image before accepting a faster draft as the final frame.

fixtures.name: cal-04-pattern.wav
fixtures.source_text: Turn left at the library, then turn left at the garden, then turn left at the old stone bridge.
fixtures.target_transcript: Turn left at the library, then turn left at the garden, then turn left at the old stone bridge.

fixtures.name: held-01-natural.wav
fixtures.source_text: Clouds will gather this afternoon, but the wind should clear the sky before the evening concert begins.
fixtures.target_transcript: clouds will gather this afternoon, but the wind should clear the sky before the evening concert begins.

fixtures.name: held-02-story.wav
fixtures.source_text: Mara opened the wooden box and found a faded map, a brass key, and a note written by her grandfather.
fixtures.target_transcript: Married opened the wooden box and found a faded map, a brass key, and a note written by her grandfather.

fixtures.name: held-03-pattern.wav
fixtures.source_text: The backup completed on Monday. The backup completed on Tuesday. The backup completed on Wednesday.
fixtures.target_transcript: The backup completed on Monday. The backup completed on Tuesday. The backup completed on Wednesday.

fixtures.name: held-04-numbers.wav
fixtures.source_text: The meeting starts on July twelfth at nine fifteen. Room twenty four is on the third floor near the north stairs.
fixtures.target_transcript: The meeting starts on July 12, 9, 15. Room 24 is on the third floor near the North Stairs.

decision.reason: The held-out target-call ceiling is only 1.085366x before draft, multi-token verification, rollback, and orchestration overhead, and all reduction comes from one deliberately repetitive fixture; three of four held-out clips remain at 1.0x.
decision.next_audio_speculation_candidate: none authorized by this screen; tiny-to-base remains a separate, costlier experiment requiring a second encoder and verified tokenizer identity

limitations: The corpus is macOS text-to-speech, not human speech, and contains only eight short English clips.
MockTarget replays real greedy token truth to measure n-gram acceptance. It does not execute a real multi-token Whisper verifier and its wall time is not product evidence.
Target-call reduction is a zero-overhead ceiling, not measured speedup. Decoder work is only part of end-to-end PCM-to-transcript time.
Exactness means the mock speculative loop reproduced the captured target token trace, including EOT. It does not establish speech-recognition accuracy.
This result does not authorize claims about audio generation, language detection, timestamps, Whisper base, human speech, or 50-100x acceleration.
